items.requirement: All required role documents and Codex agent descriptors exist and enforce sandbox/session policy.
Task, acceptance, findings, and worker-result contracts validate with the Python standard library.
Preview is the default; execute and workspace-write each require explicit flags.
One writable Owner is enforced while reviewers and verifier are fresh read-only sessions.
The isolated real exec and resume dry-run validates both WORKER_RESULT outputs without Agent writes or fallback.
items.evidence_required: Sanitized Attempt 1 and Attempt 2 reports plus ignored raw runtime files
items.expected_result: PASS, or PARTIAL only for model/resume unavailability

items.requirement: No forbidden business, Case 01, auth, remote, or dependency state is changed.
items.expected_result: Only allowed orchestration changes plus preserved pre-existing business changes
